text: Hello and welcome to Real Easy English.
zh: 你好,欢迎收听《轻松英语》。

text: In this podcast we have real conversations in easy English to help you learn.
zh: 在这档播客里,我们用简单的英语进行真实的对话,帮助你学习。

text: I'm Georgie.
zh: 我是乔琪。

text: And I'm Beth.
zh: 我是贝丝。

text: You can find a video of this podcast and a worksheet to help you practice what you've learnt on our website bbclearningenglish .com.
zh: 你可以在我们的网站bbclearningenglish.com上找到这档播客的视频和帮助你练习所学的练习题。

text: How are you today, Beth?
zh: 你今天好吗,贝丝?

text: I'm very well, thank you.
zh: 我非常好,谢谢。

text: How are you?
zh: 你好吗?

text: I'm pretty good thank you.
zh: 我挺好的,谢谢。

text: Good.
zh: 很好。

text: So what are we talking about today?
zh: 那我们今天聊什么?

text: Well Beth, today we are talking about places.
zh: 嗯,贝丝,今天我们聊地方。

text: We'll talk about the city and the countryside and which we prefer.
zh: 我们会聊城市和乡村,以及我们更喜欢哪个。

text: Very nice, okay let's start then.
zh: 非常好,那我们开始吧。

text: So Georgie, if you were going to visit somewhere for example, would you prefer to visit the city or the countryside?
zh: 那么乔琪,如果你要去某个地方玩,比如说,你更愿意去城市还是乡村?

text: Are we talking about the UK or going abroad?
zh: 我们说的是英国还是出国?

text: Let's start with the UK.
zh: 先从英国说起。

text: Okay, if I visit somewhere in the UK, I would usually want to go to the countryside.
zh: 好,如果我在英国境内游玩,我通常会想去乡村。

text: That's because I live in a city, I live in London,
zh: 那是因为我住在城市、住在伦敦,

text: but I'm from the countryside, so So sometimes I crave going out into a more rural area where I can see more green space.
zh: 但我来自乡村,所以有时我渴望去更乡野的地方,看到更多绿地。

text: There's more wildlife.
zh: 那里有更多野生动物。

text: It's almost like you need to escape the busy hustle and bustle of the city.
zh: 几乎就像你需要逃离城市里忙碌的喧嚣。

text: Yeah, you know, I completely agree with you.
zh: 是啊,你知道,我完全同意你。

text: Cities in the UK are great.
zh: 英国的城市很棒。

text: There are some great cities, but I have visited quite a lot of them.
zh: 有一些很棒的城市,但我已经去过相当多了。

text: and after a while the cities are all similar
zh: 过一阵子,这些城市就都差不多了,

text: whereas the countryside you can do different activities it's really nice to see new places
zh: 而乡村你可以做各种不同的活动,能看到新地方真的很好。

text: i am a few years ago i went to kent and i had never been to kent before because i'm from the north of england
zh: 我——几年前我去了肯特,以前我从没去过肯特,因为我来自英格兰北部,

text: and kent is in the south and it was amazing they had different kinds of buildings and like architecture on the farms we don't have those same kind of roofs
zh: 而肯特在南部;那儿太棒了,他们有不同种类的建筑,农场上的那种建筑风格,我们北部农场里没有那样的屋顶,

text: in the farms in the in the north yeah i also went to kent last year i did but i went to the seaside
zh: 在北部的农场里;是啊,我去年也去了肯特,我去了,不过我是去了海边,

text: because kent also has a bit of coastline yeah and yeah i really enjoyed visiting kent
zh: 因为肯特也有一段海岸线;是啊,我真的很喜欢游览肯特,

text: and the villages are so like cute and picturesque we could say what about when you go abroad do you do you also visit the countryside in other countries
zh: 那些村庄特别可爱、如画,可以这么说;那你出国的时候呢,你在别的国家也会去乡村吗?

text: i have done but to be honest i would normally go to a city
zh: 我去过,但老实说,我通常会去城市,

text: if i go abroad maybe the capital city or maybe a smaller city but one of the reasons for that i think is the transport
zh: 如果我出国,也许是首都,或者是个小一点的城市;但我觉得原因之一是交通,

text: it's so much easier to get a train or a bus when you're in a city um
zh: 在城市里坐火车或公交要容易得多,嗯,

text: and you'd have to hire a car i think to visit it a village or something like that it's very true usually if you go abroad
zh: 而要游览一个村庄之类的地方,我想你就得租辆车;非常对,通常如果你出国,

text: you fly to an airport and the airports are usually closer to the city um and if you only have a few days in a place it's easier to just stay in the city um
zh: 你飞到一个机场,而机场通常离城市更近,嗯;如果你在一个地方只待几天,直接待在城市里更省事,嗯;

text: it's also i guess easier to do lots of um
zh: 我想在城市里也更容易做很多,嗯,

text: like activities in the city when you visit and try out lots of the local restaurants
zh: 游览时的各种活动,还能尝试很多当地餐馆,

text: everything is closer together so you can do more things well i'm just thinking if if you're in the city you can like
zh: 什么都离得更近,所以你能做更多事;嗯,我正在想,如果你在城市里,你可以,

text: search on your phone for really good restaurants really easily but if i'm in italy for example and i don't speak italian
zh: 很容易地在手机上搜到很棒的餐馆;但如果我在意大利、又不会说意大利语,

text: it would be really difficult i think for me to find a good
zh: 我想找一家好餐馆就会很难,

text: restaurant because i wouldn't know where to go sometimes it's the locals in the countryside that are able to tell you this it might not even be on the internet.
zh: 因为我不知道该去哪儿;有时候是乡村里的当地人才能告诉你这些,它甚至可能根本没在网上。

text: Yep, that's very true.
zh: 对,非常对。

text: Let's recap the language we used in this conversation, starting with countryside.
zh: 我们来回顾一下这段对话里用到的语言,先从『countryside』(乡村)开始。

text: Land outside of towns and cities where there are not many buildings.
zh: 城镇之外、没有太多建筑的地方。

text: We can also describe this with the adjective rural.
zh: 我们也可以用形容词『rural』(乡村的)来描述它。

text: And hustle and bustle, the busyness and noise that you find in the city.
zh: 还有『hustle and bustle』,即你在城市里能感受到的忙碌与喧闹。

text: We had picturesque, which means pretty or beautiful.
zh: 我们有『picturesque』,意思是漂亮或美丽。

text: We often use this to describe a place.
zh: 我们常用它来形容一个地方。

text: And visit to go somewhere for a short time.
zh: 还有『visit』(游览),去某地待上一小段时间。

text: That's it for this episode of Real Easy English.
zh: 本期《轻松英语》就到这里。

text: Go to our website to find a worksheet to test what you've learned.
zh: 到我们网站找一份练习题,检验你学到的东西。

text: bbclearningenglish .com See you then.
zh: bbclearningenglish.com,到时候见。

text: Goodbye.
zh: 再见。
